task_completion.description: Verify a new quote is created for 'Pinnacle Distribution Co' that inherits the original terms and conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quote form or detail view shows the Account as 'Pinnacle Distribution Co' and the Terms and Conditions text area contains the specific legal disclaimer about the Master Services Agreement v4.2.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subject of the new quote is set to 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field in the quote form or detail view displays exactly 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Stage of the new quote is set to 'Draft'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stage dropdown or field displays 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Valid Until date is set to '04/15/2026' (or '2026-04-15').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Valid Until date field displays '04/15/2026' or '2026-04-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity of the 'Cisco ISR 4331 Integrated Services Router' is updated to 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the line items section, the quantity field next to the 'Cisco ISR 4331 Integrated Services Router' shows '8'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity of the 'Cisco Catalyst 9300 48-port PoE+ Switch' remains at 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the line items section, the quantity field next to the 'Cisco Catalyst 9300 48-port PoE+ Switch' shows '10'.

task_completion.description: Verify the original quote 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1' still exists and was not overwritten.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list view of Quotes showing both 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1' and 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2' as separate records, proving the original was duplicated rather than just edited.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the CRM fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values should be visible inside the appropriate SuiteCRM form fields or detail views, not just written in a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's duplicate functionality rather than creating a blank quote and manually typing everything.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the exact original Terms and Conditions and Account name on the new quote without explicit typing of the entire disclaimer in the screenshots suggests the 'Duplicate' function was used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original quote is 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1'. The new quote must have Subject: 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2', Stage: 'Draft', Valid Until: '04/15/2026' (or '2026-04-15'). Line items: 'Cisco ISR 4331 Integrated Services Router' quantity = 8, 'Cisco Catalyst 9300 48-port PoE+ Switch' quantity = 10. The new quote must retain the exact Terms and Conditions: 'LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This quote is subject to the Master Services Agreement v4.2 signed on 01/15/2023. Any hardware returns are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Valid only for Pinnacle Distribution Co.'
